author_note: William Simmons
authors:
- William Simmons
collection_id: 769
collections:
- Miscellaneous Letters Sent by the Accountant of the War Department and the Second Auditor, Apr 14, 1795-May 5, 1886. (RG217)
created: '2018-07-16T14:26:35+00:00'
day: '19'
description: Habersham's account for mounting artillery contained information on Daniel DeSaussure.  Account stated DeSaussure received credit of $500.00 for a bill on Josiah Smith.  No account of Smith
  existed in War Office or in Treasury records.  Simmons doesn't know whom to credit, he requested information relative to the sum in question.
doc_types:
- Author's Letterbook Copy
document_number: '1797101921255'
